description_long: This is a streamlined, single-propeller airplane with a sleek, elongated fuselage painted in a deep blue color. The aircraft features a single set of straight, low-mounted wings and a conventional tail with a rounded vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is positioned forward of the wing root and is enclosed with a clear canopy, likely designed for a single pilot. The engine cowling displays multiple exhaust ports, and the propeller is mounted at the nose. The landing gear appears to be a taildragger configuration, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The surface finish is smooth and glossy, with visible panel lines and subtle markings on the tail.
description: A sleek, blue single-propeller airplane with low-mounted straight wings, a forward enclosed cockpit, and a conventional tail. The aircraft has a glossy finish and a streamlined design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, low-mounted wing, forward cockpit, and propeller at the nose.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, narrow fuselage, and symmetrical wing span.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other side of the fuselage, wing, and tail details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the taildragger landing gear, tail structure, and the trailing edges of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main wheels and a single tail wheel, fixed gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy integrated into the fuselage.
